data_acquisition.description: Acquire raw mass spectrometry data files (mzML, RAW, wiff) and sample metadata

spec_preferred_methods.geoparse_python_processed_matrices: GEO-only Python fallback (geoparse). Select only when every SME-named accession is a GSE and CNGB/NGDC/EGA sources are absent from the cohort. If a non-GEO accession is present, this method SHOULD NOT be top-ranked alone — it forces silent cohort truncation. Pair with a CNGB/NGDC helper or escalate to multi_repo_processed_matrices_python.
spec_preferred_methods.geoquery_r_processed_matrices: GEO-only R fallback (GEOquery / Bioconductor). Same scope caveat as geoparse_python_processed_matrices. Requires r_seurat=true or equivalent Bioconductor capability at runtime.
spec_preferred_methods.multi_repo_processed_matrices_python: Preferred: dispatch per-accession by prefix. GEO (GSE*) → GEOparse; SRA (SRP*/PRJNA*) → pysradb + prefetch; CNGB CNSA (CNP*) → HTTPS to ftp.cngb.org/pub/CNSA + scripts/helpers/cngb_fetch.py; NGDC GSA (CRA*/HRA* public) → ngdc.cncb.ac.cn download API. Union of processed matrices written to a single manifest. Keeps the "use published matrices, do not reprocess FASTQ" commitment while covering non-GEO public repos.
spec_preferred_methods.multi_repo_processed_matrices_r: R/Bioconductor equivalent — GEO via GEOquery, SRA via SRAdb, CNGB/NGDC via httr + a shared URL-resolver helper. Use only when env_capability shows r_seurat=true; otherwise prefer the Python multi_repo method.
spec_preferred_methods.sme_provided_direct_urls: SME supplies a TSV of {accession, direct_url, sha256} when repository APIs are unavailable or when a specific mirror is preferred. Agent downloads via curl/wget and verifies checksums.

discover_data_acquisition.description: Discover best-practice method for: Acquire raw mass spectrometry data files (mzML, RAW, wiff) and sample metadata

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_protein_database.description: Select reference proteome database (UniProt, RefSeq) appropriate for organism and study design

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_quantification_strategy.description: Determine quantification approach (label-free LFQ, TMT/iTRAQ, SILAC) from experiment design

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_search_engine.description: Discover appropriate database search engine for experiment type (DIA-NN + FragPipe-DIA preferred for DIA acquisitions; FragPipe / MSFragger for DDA; MaxQuant retained as DDA legacy path; Spectronaut as commercial alternative)

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

protein_identification.description: Search MS/MS spectra against reference database to identify peptides and proteins

quantification.description: Quantify protein abundance across samples using discovered strategy

raw_file_processing.description: Convert vendor raw files to open formats and assess instrument performance metrics

results_reporting.description: Generate proteomics report with volcano plots, protein lists, and pathway enrichment

results_review.description: SME reviews identified proteins and differential abundance findings

statistical_analysis.description: Perform differential abundance analysis and multiple testing correction

validate_protein_identification.description: Validate outputs of: Search MS/MS spectra against reference database to identify peptides and proteins

validate_quantification.description: Validate outputs of: Quantify protein abundance across samples using discovered strategy

validate_raw_file_processing.description: Validate outputs of: Convert vendor raw files to open formats and assess instrument performance metrics

validate_results.description: Validate protein identifications (FDR, missed cleavages) and quantification reproducibility

validate_results_reporting.description: Validate outputs of: Generate proteomics report with volcano plots, protein lists, and pathway enrichment
